use_cases: Displaying success confirmations after form submissions or account creation
Showing error messages when operations fail
Providing status updates for background processes
Notifying users of system alerts or important announcements
Confirming successful actions like saves, deletes, or updates
ai_summary: A toast notification component built with Ark UI that displays temporary feedback messages at the bottom-end of the screen. Features smooth entrance animations, dismissible toasts with close button, and portal-based rendering. Minimalist design with clean typography and subtle shadows suitable for any application requiring user feedback notifications.
